memoryArtifacts.headline: Adeliza of Leuven also called Adela and Aleidis; 1103 To 1151. Queen Consort Second Wife of Henry I.

popularStory.headline: Adeliza of Louvain
popularStory.description:
Adeliza of Louvain
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Adeliza of Louvain

Queen consort of England
Tenure	24 January 1121 – 1 December 1135
Coronation	30 January 1121
Spouse	Henry I of Engla …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza de Louvain於1103年出生在比利時布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen43歲，母親Ida de Chiny26歲。她於1121年1月24日與Henry I King of England在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素結婚。她去世於1151年4月23日在比利時布拉班特阿福利格姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza de Louvain于1103年出生在比利时布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen43岁，母亲Ida de Chiny26岁。她于1121年1月24日与Henry I King of England在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素结婚。她去世于1151年4月23日在比利时布拉班特阿福利格姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza de Louvain was born in 1103, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, her father, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 43 and her mother, Ida de Chiny, was 26. She married Henry I King of England on 24 January 1121, in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. She died on 23 April 1151, in Affligem, Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza de Louvain est née en 1103, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique, son père, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ida de Chiny, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Henry I King of England le 24 janvier 1121, à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1151, à Affligem, Brabant, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza de Louvain 1103 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 43 und ihre Mutter Ida de Chiny 26. Sie hat am 24. Januar 1121 in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England Henry I King of England geheiratet. Sie starb am 23. April 1151 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Affligem, Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Louvain è nata il nel 1103 nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio, sua padre, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Ida de Chiny, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Henry I King of England il 24 gennaio 1121, nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. Morì il 23 aprile 1151, nel Affligem, Brabante, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Louvainが1103年にベルギーブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは43歳，母Ida de Chinyは26歳であった。1121年1月24日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルでHenry I King of Englandと結婚した。彼女は1151年4月23日にベルギーブラバントアフリジェムで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Louvain(이)가 1103년 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida de Chiny(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1121년 1월 24일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 Henry I King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1151년 4월 23일 벨기에 브라반트 아플리그에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: Buckenham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Louvain nasceu em 1103, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Chiny, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry I King of England em 24 de janeiro de 1121, em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1151, em Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza de Louvain родилась в 1103 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ida de Chiny, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry I King of England 24 января 1121 г. в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия. Она умерла 23 апреля 1151 г. в местности аффлигем, брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza de Louvain nació en 1103, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, su papá, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ida de Chiny, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Henry I King of England el 24 de enero de 1121, en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 23 de abril de 1151, en Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años.
